creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206731
Patch that fixes some style issues, adds DIST_SUBDIR and clean the Makefile

Cleaned up the Makefile by running portlint(1) and portfmt(1).

Adds a DIST_SUBIR to prevent clutter of distfiles.

Bumped PKGREVISION due to the addition of DIST_SUBDIR.

Tested builds in 12.0-RELEASE-p9 (amd64).

Would be nice if this can be applied to the ports tree.
